title: Post-Marketing Surveillance of the Safety and Effectiveness of Cabozantinib in Japanese Patients With Advanced Renal Cell Carcinoma.
abstract: This post-marketing surveillance study evaluated the real-world safety and effectiveness of cabozantinib in Japanese patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (aRCC).
trial_name: Cabozantinib versus Everolimus in Advanced Renal-Cell Carcinoma
